titleStmt.title: SII 24.303: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 303. (A.R. No. 72 of 1938-39.) CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of house sites by the executives of the temple to Aṇṇappa Chavuṇḍappar, the Sthānika of the temple and the son of Viṭṭhappaṅgaḷ of Jauḷa in Veḷuvala (Belvola-) dēśa, in recognition of his services in the administration of the temple. The gift is said to have been sanctioned by the god. Chavuṇḍappa is said to have consecrated the deity Viṭṭalanātha and provided for regular offerings therein. He further made for the god an aureola (Tiruvāśigai), repaired the 1,000-pillared maṇḍapa and also gilded the kōyilāḻvār i.e., vimāna of the temple. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1318, Dhātu, Mithuna, śu. 2, Thursday, Punarpūśam correspond regularly to A.D. 1396, June 8, Thursday, ·28; ·15.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍale
śvaran harirāyavibhāṭan
bhāṣaikkuttappum Irāyar
kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭa
ṉ catusamudrā(t)dhipati śrīha
rihararāyaṉ kumārar
śrī vīra viruppaṇṇa Uṭaiyār pṛthivirājyam
paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 10 8- ṉ me
l cellāniṉṟa dhātusamvatsarattu mithuna nā
yaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattudvitiyaiyum bṛhaspati vāramum
peṟṟa punarpūcattunāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati va
ḷa nāṭṭu viḻānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkat tiruppati koyil
stāṉikar veḷuvala deśattil jeḷalaiyil śrīvat
sagotrattu Āślāyanasūtrattu ṛgvedāddhyāyi
viṭṭappaṅkaḷ putrar Aṇṇappar cavuṇṭappar perumāḷu
kku tiruvācikaiyum paṇṇic cātti Āyirakkāl tirumaṇṭapam
taḷamum cāntum Iṭuvittu Aḻivu corntu viṭṭalanātaraiyum
pratiṣṭittu koyilāḻvār poṉṉum meyvittu kālat
tile Oru ciṟappum Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭiyum kaṟpittu
Inta rājyamum niti Uṭaṉe naṭatta tiruviṭaiyāṭṭappaṟ
ṟum paripālaṉattuṭaṉe naṭattiṉa Intabhagavat kaiṅ
garyyattiṉāle perumāḷ tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷi Ivarka
ḷukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nāṉāḻi prasātamum Irutūṇi nellum
kaṟpittu śrī seṉāpatip peruvilaiyāka viṟṟa vaṭakkil vikra
ma coḻaṉ tiruvitiyil meltuṇṭattu Ālampākka
ṉ Iruṅkaṇṭi devarājabhaṭṭar maṉaikku kiḻa
kku maṭattu simaikku meṟku naṭuviṭṭu meṟku
pūrvasvānkaḷ Illāmal paṇṭāra maṉai Āy pāḻā
yk kiṭanta maṉaikol Eṭṭum Ācandrārkkasthāyiyā
ka śrīsenāpatip peruvilaiyāka vilaipramāṇam pa
ṇṇi perumāḷ tirukkaiyāle Udagamum paṇṇi
kkuṭuttuk ko
ḷvatāṉa viracampa
ṉ kuḷikai poṉ 10 2
Ippoṉ paṉṉiraṇṭu
m Āriyapaṭṭakaḷil Iṉi pi
ḷḷaiyār pārvaiyāka tiru A
karattil Oṭukkuvittuk ko
ṇṭu vilaip pramāṇam paṇ
ṇik kuṭuttom Ippaṇam nūṟ
ṟu Irupatukkum viṟṟa maṉai
kol Eṭṭum maṉaippuḻa
kkaṭaiyum melnokkina
maram kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟu niti
nikṣepam jalapāṣāṇa
m maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa sa
mastaprāptikaḷukkum Urittāva
tākavum Immaṉaikku pūrva
svānkaḷum Illai munpu Oru
ttarkkum perumāḷ kuṭut
taruḷiṉatum I
llai Itukku kala
ṉuḷavākat toṟṟu
ppaṭṭāl nāṅkaḷe
tirntu kuṭuttu Inta maṉai
taṅkaḷukku nilai peṟuttit tarakka
ṭavom Ākavum Inta maṉai
kku Iyātoruvar kalaivu paṇ
ṇiṉār Uṇṭu Ākil Avarkaḷ
perumāḷ tiruvuḷḷattukkum
samaiyattukkum tap
ppar cavuṇṭappa
la stāṉattārom §
Digital edition of SII 24.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
